reviews.author: Mama Tried
reviews.text: Josh was absolutely amazing!!! Honest, Godly and a first responder to boot. He not only communicated with me every time I emailed a question or concern, but got my 86yo Mom’s house and outbuilding white as snow, he then left to go to my Aunts & Uncles across Wilmington to give them a quote and started working the same day…can you find any better service?

reviews.author: MIKEY PARKS
reviews.text: He showed up on time and went above and beyond getting my house and sidewalk and driveway cleaned and looking NEW !! highly recommend !!!!

reviews.author: Susan Chesson
reviews.text: Josh was super efficient & communicative. Great service all around!

reviews.author: Justin
reviews.text: High Tide Soft Wash did a fantastic job power washing the house. He was courteous, respectful and timely. Would recommend anyone to reach out for a quote.

reviews.author: Dale Nixon
reviews.text:
Highly recommend High Tide Soft Wash to all my neighbors. Josh, owner and operator of the business is professional, on time, focuses on work quality and complete . customer satisfaction. Josh pre-wet and helped cover all my plants. Very personable and courteous. He was not satisfied with the quality of cleaning on a very small portion of  my front porch floor and went back and rewashed  it a second time of his own volition with no prompting by me. The quality of the complete house soft wash was excellent. Josh took great care of my property and I'll definitely call him again next year! Thank you Josh!
Dale and Pat Nixon

reviews.author: Traci Brown
reviews.text: Very pleased !!!! You cant go wrong hiring High Tide ! Pressure washed our house & driveway and did an amazing job ! I cant complain at all and his price was on point

reviews.author: James Foutty
reviews.text: Fast, efficient, great work at a great price. Would recommend and use again!

reviews.author: Josh Richards
reviews.text: Josh did an incredible job restoring our property to it's "new" condition with his pressure washing expertise!  Absolutely recommend!  Great work!
